revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/sandbox]] to [[User:Immanuelle/Chokusaisha and Twenty Two Shrines]]
[[WP:AES|←]]Removed redirect to [[User:Immanuelle/Chokusaisha and Twenty Two Shrines]]
added [[Category:Kasuga-taisha]] using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/sandbox]] to [[Template:Kasuga Faith]]
Convert [[Himegami]] to wikilink (The bot operation is completed 36.5% in total)
[[MOS:DRAFTNOLINK]] - that {{ill}} seems to work with draft: is an accident of syntax, not an intended use; also, [[Kasuga Gongen]] exists
23 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Kasuga_Faith]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Text replacement - "{{Interlanguage link|" to "{{Interlanguage link|12=draft|"
Text replacement - "|春日神社 (大分市)}}" to "|春日神社 (大分市)|1=Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)}}"

Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Removing from [[Category:Pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Original templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "{{Interlanguage link|12=draft" to "{{ill|"
Text replacement - "{{ill||" to "{{ill|"
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Text replacement - "[[Category:qq]]" to ""
Text replacement - "|春日神|" to "|春日神|1=Kasuga-no-Kami|2=ja|3=春日神|4=fr|5=Kasuga no Kami|6=zh|7=春日權現|8=wuu|9=春日權現|"
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q123981350)
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Navbox | name = Kasuga Faith | title = [[Kasuga-taisha|Kasuga Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Kasuga-taisha11bs3200.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Kasuga-no-Kami|ja|春日神|1=Kasuga-no-Kami|2=ja|3=春日神|4=fr|5=Kasuga no Kami|6=zh|7=春日權現|8=wuu|9=春日權現|fr|Kasuga_no_Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|qq=}} ** [[Takemikazuchi]]-o ** [[Futsunushi]] ** [[Ame-no-Koyane]] ** [[Himegami]] ** {{ill|Ame-no-Oshikumone|ja|天押雲根命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|qq=}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Kasuga-taisha]] * [[Hiraoka Shrine]] (Moto-Kasuga) * [[:en:Ōharano Shrine|Ōharano Shrine]] * [[Hirano Shrine]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shrine|Yoshida Shrine]] * {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|ja|春日神社 (大分市)|1=Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|qq=}} * {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Isagawa Shrine|ja|率川神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|qq=}} |group5 = Misc |list5 = * [[Fujiwara clan]] * [[Nakatomi clan]] * {{ill|Urabe clan|lt=Yoshida family|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|qq=}} * [[Kasugayama Primeval Forest]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shintō|Yoshida Shintō]] * {{ill|Kasuga Mandalas|ja|春日曼荼羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|qq=}} * [[Kasuga Gongen Genki E]] }}<noinclude> [[sn:Kasuga Faith]] [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[sn:Kasuga Faith]][[Category:Kasuga-taisha]] [[Category:Kasuga shrines]] [[en:Kasuga Faith]][[sn:Kasuga Faith]] </noinclude><noinclude>[[en:Template:Kasuga Faith]]</noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q123981350}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kasuga Faith | title = [[Kasuga-taisha|Kasuga Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Kasuga-taisha11bs3200.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Kasuga-no-Kami|ja|春日神|1=Kasuga-no-Kami|2=ja|3=春日神|4=fr|5=Kasuga no Kami|6=zh|7=春日權現|8=wuu|9=春日權現|fr|Kasuga_no_Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|qq=}} ** [[Takemikazuchi]]-o ** [[Futsunushi]] ** [[Ame-no-Koyane]] ** [[Himegami]] ** {{ill|Ame-no-Oshikumone|ja|天押雲根命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|qq=}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Kasuga-taisha]] * [[Hiraoka Shrine]] (Moto-Kasuga) * [[:en:Ōharano Shrine|Ōharano Shrine]] * [[Hirano Shrine]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shrine|Yoshida Shrine]] * {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|ja|春日神社 (大分市)|1=Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|qq=}} * {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Isagawa Shrine|ja|率川神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|qq=}} |group5 = Misc |list5 = * [[Fujiwara clan]] * [[Nakatomi clan]] * {{ill|Urabe clan|lt=Yoshida family|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|qq=}} * [[Kasugayama Primeval Forest]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shintō|Yoshida Shintō]] * {{ill|Kasuga Mandalas|ja|春日曼荼羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|qq=}} * [[Kasuga Gongen Genki E]] }}<noinclude> [[sn:Kasuga Faith]]
[[sn:Kasuga Faith]]
[[en:Kasuga Faith]][[sn:Kasuga Faith]] </noinclude><noinclude>[[en:Template:Kasuga Faith]]</noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q123981350}}</noinclude> [[Category:Kasuga shrines]] [[Category:Kasuga-taisha]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:Shinto templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kasuga Faith | title = [[Kasuga-taisha|Kasuga Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Kasuga-taisha11bs3200.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Kasuga-no-Kami|ja|春日神|1=Kasuga-no-Kami|2=ja|3=春日神|4=fr|5=Kasuga no Kami|6=zh|7=春日權現|8=wuu|9=春日權現|fr|Kasuga_no_Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|qq=}} ** [[Takemikazuchi]]-o ** [[Futsunushi]] ** [[Ame-no-Koyane]] ** [[Himegami]] ** {{ill|Ame-no-Oshikumone|ja|天押雲根命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|qq=}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Kasuga-taisha]] * [[Hiraoka Shrine]] (Moto-Kasuga) * [[:en:Ōharano Shrine|Ōharano Shrine]] * [[Hirano Shrine]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shrine|Yoshida Shrine]] * {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|ja|春日神社 (大分市)|1=Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|qq=}} * {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Isagawa Shrine|ja|率川神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|qq=}} |group5 = Misc |list5 = * [[Fujiwara clan]] * [[Nakatomi clan]] * {{ill|Urabe clan|lt=Yoshida family|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|qq=}} * [[Kasugayama Primeval Forest]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shintō|Yoshida Shintō]] * {{ill|Kasuga Mandalas|ja|春日曼荼羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|qq=}} * [[Kasuga Gongen Genki E]] }}<noinclude> [[sn:Kasuga Faith]]
[[sn:Kasuga Faith]]
[[en:Kasuga Faith]][[sn:Kasuga Faith]] </noinclude><noinclude>[[en:Template:Kasuga Faith]]</noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q123981350}}</noinclude> [[Category:Kasuga shrines]] [[Category:Kasuga-taisha]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kasuga Faith | title = [[Kasuga-taisha|Kasuga Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Kasuga-taisha11bs3200.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Kasuga-no-Kami|ja|春日神|1=Kasuga-no-Kami|2=ja|3=春日神|4=fr|5=Kasuga no Kami|6=zh|7=春日權現|8=wuu|9=春日權現|fr|Kasuga_no_Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|qq=}} ** [[Takemikazuchi]]-o ** [[Futsunushi]] ** [[Ame-no-Koyane]] ** [[Himegami]] ** {{ill|Ame-no-Oshikumone|ja|天押雲根命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|qq=}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Kasuga-taisha]] * [[Hiraoka Shrine]] (Moto-Kasuga) * [[:en:Ōharano Shrine|Ōharano Shrine]] * [[Hirano Shrine]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shrine|Yoshida Shrine]] * {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|ja|春日神社 (大分市)|1=Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|qq=}} * {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Isagawa Shrine|ja|率川神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|qq=}} |group5 = Misc |list5 = * [[Fujiwara clan]] * [[Nakatomi clan]] * {{ill|Urabe clan|lt=Yoshida family|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|qq=}} * [[Kasugayama Primeval Forest]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shintō|Yoshida Shintō]] * {{ill|Kasuga Mandalas|ja|春日曼荼羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|qq=}} * [[Kasuga Gongen Genki E]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTKasuga Faith]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kasuga Faith | title = [[Kasuga-taisha|Kasuga Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Kasuga-taisha11bs3200.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Kasuga-no-Kami|ja|春日神|1=Kasuga-no-Kami|2=ja|3=春日神|4=fr|5=Kasuga no Kami|6=zh|7=春日權現|8=wuu|9=春日權現|fr|Kasuga_no_Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|qq=}} ** [[Takemikazuchi]]-o ** [[Futsunushi]] ** [[Ame-no-Koyane]] ** [[Himegami]] ** {{ill|Ame-no-Oshikumone|ja|天押雲根命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|qq=}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Kasuga-taisha]] * [[Hiraoka Shrine]] (Moto-Kasuga) * [[:en:Ōharano Shrine|Ōharano Shrine]] * [[Hirano Shrine]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shrine|Yoshida Shrine]] * {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|ja|春日神社 (大分市)|1=Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|qq=}} * {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Isagawa Shrine|ja|率川神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|qq=}} |group5 = Misc |list5 = * [[Fujiwara clan]] * [[Nakatomi clan]] * {{ill|Urabe clan|lt=Yoshida family|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|qq=}} * [[Kasugayama Primeval Forest]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shintō|Yoshida Shintō]] * {{ill|Kasuga Mandalas|ja|春日曼荼羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|qq=}} * [[Kasuga Gongen Genki E]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTKasuga Faith]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24271391609|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kasuga Faith | title = [[Kasuga-taisha|Kasuga Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Kasuga-taisha11bs3200.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Kasuga-no-Kami|ja|春日神|1=Kasuga-no-Kami|2=ja|3=春日神|4=fr|5=Kasuga no Kami|6=zh|7=春日權現|8=wuu|9=春日權現|fr|Kasuga_no_Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga-no-Kami|qq=}} ** [[Takemikazuchi]]-o ** [[Futsunushi]] ** [[Ame-no-Koyane]] ** [[Himegami]] ** {{ill|Ame-no-Oshikumone|ja|天押雲根命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|qq=}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Kasuga-taisha]] * [[Hiraoka Shrine]] (Moto-Kasuga) * [[:en:Ōharano Shrine|Ōharano Shrine]] * [[Hirano Shrine]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shrine|Yoshida Shrine]] * {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|ja|春日神社 (大分市)|1=Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Oita)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Ōita)|qq=}} * {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Isagawa Shrine|ja|率川神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isagawa Shrine|qq=}} |group5 = Misc |list5 = * [[Fujiwara clan]] * [[Nakatomi clan]] * {{ill|Urabe clan|lt=Yoshida family|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|qq=}} * [[Kasugayama Primeval Forest]] * [[:en:Yoshida Shintō|Yoshida Shintō]] * {{ill|Kasuga Mandalas|ja|春日曼荼羅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Mandalas|qq=}} * [[Kasuga Gongen Genki E]] }}<noinclude>
[[en:Kasuga Faith]]</noinclude><noinclude>[[en:Template:Kasuga Faith]]{{wikidata link|Q123981350}} [[Category:Kasuga shrines]] [[Category:Kasuga-taisha]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
